author: lucas
description: Publish notes as short links and track who's viewed them. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Publish notes as short links and track who's viewed them.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

- feat: add footer with language-specific generation message and improve share popover event handling (129255c)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Added an export-depth setting (1–3 levels) replacing the include-linked-notes toggle, so a note can pull in its sub-pages, and their sub-pages, recursively
2. Added `.base` embed support to publishing: notes matched by an embedded base now publish as sub-pages and their in-table links resolve to the exported pages
3. Added Unique-note prefix compatibility that strips the core "Unique note creator" timestamp prefix from exported page titles and link text
4. Changed the publish confirmation to a hierarchical sub-page tree with per-page checkboxes, a 50-page limit warning, and the "export to OSS" command now opens it
5. Fixed external links being broken when rewriting internal links during export

---

1. 新增导出层级设置（1–3 级），取代「包含二级笔记」开关，可逐层向下递归导出子页面
2. 发布新增对 `.base` 嵌入的支持：被嵌入 base 匹配到的笔记会作为子页面一并发布，表格内的链接也会指向导出的页面
3. 新增「Unique 笔记前缀兼容」，从导出页面的标题与链接文字中去掉核心插件「唯一笔记创建器」的时间戳前缀
4. 发布确认改为带层级的子页面树，支持逐页勾选、超过 50 页的上限提示，「导出到 OSS」命令也改为打开该面板
5. 修复导出时改写内部链接会破坏外部链接的问题

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Added Tencent Cloud COS as a storage provider you can publish to, alongside Alibaba Cloud OSS, selectable in settings
2. Added a publish destination selector so you can choose where each note is published
3. Changed updating a published note to also re-upload its linked sub-notes, keeping them in sync

---

1. 新增腾讯云 COS 作为可发布的存储服务，与阿里云 OSS 并列，可在设置中选择
2. 新增发布目标选择器，可为每篇笔记选择发布到哪个存储
3. 更新已发布笔记时改为同时重新上传其关联子笔记，保持同步

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Added a redesigned share popover card (replacing the old share modal) with a live progress bar that shows rendering and per-page upload/delete steps while publishing, updating, or unpublishing
2. Added a 14-day visit trend chart and expandable visitor breakdowns (referrers, browsers, and more) to the share popover, served instantly from a session cache so reopening no longer flickers
3. Fixed the ZIP export so page files are written as correct binary data, ensuring the downloaded archive is always valid

---

1. 新增重新设计的分享气泡卡片（取代旧的分享弹窗），发布、更新、取消发布时显示实时进度条，呈现渲染与各页面的上传/删除步骤
2. 分享气泡新增近 14 天访问趋势图与可展开的访客来源细分（来源、浏览器等），并借助会话缓存即时展示，重新打开不再闪烁
3. 修复 ZIP 导出，页面文件以正确的二进制数据写入，确保下载的压缩包始终有效

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Added a dedicated Share Stats page (ribbon icon + "Open share stats" command) listing every published page and its cumulative view count
2. Added view count and recent activity to the share popover so you can see how a page is doing at a glance
3. Changed the analytics backend to a self-hosted, privacy-friendly GoatCounter instance; the analytics API token is now optional
4. Added support for all three Obsidian Bases views (list, table, cards) when rendering .base embeds
5. Fixed code blocks inside task list items overflowing the page width on exported pages

---

1. 新增独立的「分享统计」页面（功能区图标 +「打开分享统计」命令），集中列出每个已发布页面及其累计访问量
2. 分享卡片新增访问量与近期活动展示，一眼掌握页面表现
3. 分析后端改为自托管、隐私友好的 GoatCounter 实例；分析 API token 现为可选项
4. 渲染 .base 嵌入时支持全部三种 Obsidian Bases 视图（列表、表格、卡片）
5. 修复任务列表项内代码块在导出页面中超出页面宽度的问题

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Added Umami Cloud analytics: published pages can track page views, and view counts show in the share modal
2. Added a status-bar share popover — click the status-bar icon to publish, update, unpublish, export, or open the link from one card
3. Added stale detection: the status-bar icon flags when a published note has changed since it was last shared, with a one-click update

---

1. 新增 Umami Cloud 分析：已发布页面可统计访问量，分享弹窗中展示浏览次数
2. 新增状态栏分享卡片——点击状态栏图标即可在一个卡片内发布、更新、停止分享、导出或打开链接
3. 新增过期检测：已发布笔记内容变动后，状态栏图标会提示，并支持一键更新

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. One-click publish current note as a shareable webpage link
2. Export note as local HTML folder
3. Auto-generate table of contents for notes with headings
4. Renders math (KaTeX), Mermaid diagrams, code blocks, callouts, tables, and images
5. Mermaid diagrams support zoom toggle for oversized charts
6. Image gallery view for multi-image blocks
7. Linked notes can be batch-published or unpublished together via share modal
8. Configurable page link length (2–6 chars) to control short-code size
9. Fixed OSS link generation, credential validation, and unpublish modal appearance

---

1. 一键将当前笔记发布为可分享的网页链接
2. 支持导出为本地 HTML 文件夹
3. 含标题的笔记自动生成目录导航
4. 支持数学公式、Mermaid 图表、代码块、Callout、表格、图片渲染
5. Mermaid 图表支持缩放切换，适配超宽图表
6. 支持多图画廊展示
7. 新增分享弹窗，支持批量发布或停止分享关联笔记
8. 新增页面链接长度设置（2–6 位），控制生成链接短码的字符数
9. 修复 OSS 链接生成、凭证校验与停止分享弹窗样式问题
